---
title: "Projections of Future Incidence"
author: "Thibaut Jombart"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: github_document
---

 [![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/reconhub/projections2/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/reconhub/projections2/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)
  [![Codecov test coverage](https://codecov.io/gh/reconhub/projections2/graph/badge.svg)](https://app.codecov.io/gh/reconhub/projections2)
  

## Getting started

To install the package, use:
```{r eval = FALSE}

pak::pak("reconhub/projections2")

```
